results.title: Roxette's 40th anniversary tour headed to L.A.'s Greek Theatre
results.description: Swedish pop band Roxette is hitting the road to mark its 40th anniversary, including a stop at Los Angeles’ Greek Theatre. This year marks four decades since their debut album, Pearls of Passion, was released, launching the duo into pop history. The 40th-anniversary tour will feature group founder Per Gessle alongside Lena Philipsson. Roxette originally [...]
